description: You are an IT Support Coordinator at a university. Three new faculty members are starting next week, and you need to set up their peripheral equipment tracking in Snipe-IT. Create five accessories in the existing Computer Peripherals category with the following details: Dell USB-C Docking Station WD19S (Manufacturer: Dell, Model: WD19S, Total Qty: 6, Min Qty: 2, Cost: $219.99), HP E24 G5 Monitor Stand (Manufacturer: HP, Model: 6N4E2AA, Total Qty: 8, Min Qty: 3, Cost: $49.99), Lenovo Professional Wireless Keyboard (Manufacturer: Lenovo, Model: 4Y41D64891, Total Qty: 10, Min Qty: 3, Cost: $39.99), Lenovo Professional Wireless Mouse (Manufacturer: Lenovo, Model: 4Y51J62544, Total Qty: 10, Min Qty: 3, Cost: $29.99), and Poly Voyager Focus 2 Headset (Manufacturer: Poly, Model: 214432-01, Total Qty: 5, Min Qty: 2, Cost: $199.99). Check out one of each of these accessories to Maria Santos (msantos), James Liu (jliu), and Aisha Patel (apatel).
